title: Military aircraft from Middle East at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: The United Arab Emirates Air Force C-17A Globemaster passed by our photographer (Image: Charlie Gilmour) The United Arab Emirates Air Force C-17A Globemaster passed by our photographer Charlie Gilmour. The aircraft has been in service since 2012 and was painted in its special gold colour last year. The United Arab Emirates Air Force C-17A Globemaster passed by our photographer Charlie Gilmour (Image: Charlie Gilmour) It is a regular sight at Prestwick, and is also well-known from appearances at the prestigious Dubai Airshow.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: It is unique from most C-17 military aircraft which are normally grey in colour. The Boeing C-17 Globemaster III is mostly used for rapid strategic airlift of troops and cargo to main operating bases or forward bases anywhere in the world. Military aircraft from Middle East at Prestwick Airport | Ayr Advertiser
